title: Thracia Cho Leem

{{Quote|Young Jedi, you have learned some hard truths. Power and even discipline are not sufficient. Self-knowledge is the most difficult of our many journeys.|Thracia Cho Leem, to [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]]|<ref name="RP" />}}
'''Thracia Cho Leem''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] serving in the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] in the waning years of the [[Republic Era]]. While not always agreeing with the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council's]] choices, Master Leem maintained a good relationship with Councilor [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]]. She trained many [[Padawan/Legends|Padawans]] to [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Knighthood]], with one of her most prominent being the [[Fosh/Legends|Fosh]] Jedi [[Vergere]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|It's wonderful to have you with us, Thracia, after so many years.|Windu to Leem|<ref name="RP" />}}
Thracia Cho Leem was a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] in the years before the the fall of the Republic. Though atypical for a Jedi, she was respected and admired by the Jedi Council. She was trained as a [[Jedi Consular]] and was particularly renowned for her healing abilities.<ref name="POTJ" /><ref name="RP" />

Leem lived her life amongst the people of the Republic, returning to the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] only to present Padawans to the Council.<ref name="POTJ" /> During her travels, she violated the [[Jedi Code/Legends|Jedi Code's]] ban on attachments, marrying several times and having many sons and daughters all over [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. She was allowed to remain a Jedi Master even in light of the Council's knowledge of these affairs.<ref name="RP" />

====Padawan Lost====
{{Quote|Thracia was renowned for training female Jedi, not for preparing males.|[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] on Leem|<ref name="RP" />}}
Master Leem took several, predominately female, Padawans during her time in the Order. Few were as special as the [[Fosh/Legends|Fosh]] Jedi [[Vergere]]. Having been with Vergere the moment she hatched, Leem took the avian as her apprentice and raised her to the rank of Knight. She was a very capable Jedi and chose to go on mission to the living planet [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]] in [[30 BBY/Legends|30 BBY]] to investigate an attack there. Though confident in Vergere's self-reliance, Leem presented her concerns on Vergere's whereabouts after not hearing from her for a year.

There, she encountered Jedi Knight [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and young Padawan [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]]. Skywalker was close to dismissal from the Order for a dangerous [[Garbage pit]] race in [[Galactic City/Legends|Galactic City]]. Leem intervened and helped the Council realize Skywalker needed a mission to truly find his sense of purpose. She requested that Kenobi be sent to Zonama Sekot to investigate, which allowed Skywalker to go as well, something Kenobi was not initially thrilled about.<ref name="RP" /> <ref name="The Official Star Wars Fact File 45">[[The Official Star Wars Fact File 45|''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 45]]</ref>

When the two returned to Coruscant, they concluded that Vergere had been taken by beings known as the [[Yuuzhan Vong|Far Outsiders]] and that she was beyond the Order's reach. Leem then set out to counsel and heal Skywalker from his ordeal on the planet. Within months of this, Leem left the Order without explanation.<ref name="RP" /> [[Great Holocron/Legends|The Great Holocron]] indicates that Leem was not considered a part of the [[Lost Twenty/Legends|Lost Twenty]] despite being a master at the time of her departure.<ref name="Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force real-life book">[[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']]</ref>

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|Sometimes I think you all should take a break, as I did, and sniff the real air, see how the Force manifests in everyday life, rather than mope around learning how to swing lightsabers.|Thracia Cho Leem to [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]]|<ref name="RP" />}}
Thracia Cho Leem was a [[Human/Legends|human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] with short gray [[Hair/Legends|hair]], an aquiline [[nose]], and large, ultramarine [[eye]]s. She was short and thin, being about the same height as 12 year old Anakin Skywalker at 1.35 [[Meter/Legends|meters]].<ref name="RP" />

Somewhat unorthodox as a Jedi, she much preferred life outside the Jedi Temple. She rarely visited [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], instead living on many agricultural worlds in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] and [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]. She was a constant reminder to the [[Jedi Council/Legends|Jedi Council]] that serving the people requires understanding them.<ref name="POTJ" />

She was snarky and quick-witted, often criticizing the Council and their teaching methods. Encountering the Council lecturing young Skywalker, she accused them of "ganging up on the boy" and terrifying him". She was able to easily make her points to the Council known with snide and sarcastic remarks. Leem was one of the few people who could out jape [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]], a fact he knew quite well.<ref name="RP" />
